title: Nokium
description: Adds Many Nokia Bassed Items And Blocks To Minecraft
body:
# Things You Should Know Before Downloading This Mod:

## What Is In The Mod:

### This Mod Adds Nokia Items To Minecraft Like:
Nokia Ore, A Nokia Demension (That You Need To Lite With A Nokia Portal Liter, Nokia Tools, And Almost Indestructable Nokia Armour. The Nokia Items Are Harder To Find But Are Stronger Than Netherite!

## How To Report Bugs:

If There Are **ANY** Problems About This Mod, Please Message Me(Morph_Mojang) On [My Account](https://scratch.mit.edu/users/Morph_Mojang)
(By The Way _The **Modrinth** "Links" Thing_ Didn't Let Me Type It There)

## What A Relese/Alpha/Beta Update Means:

A Relese Means A Full Update (Added **ALOT** Of Items/Blocks/Advancements etc And Maby Even A Bug Fix),
Alpha Means A Small Update (Added 1, 2 or 3 Blocks/Items/Adancement ect)
Beta Means A Bug Fix
